aesthetic.

Talk to the stylist immediately, switch on the webcam if you want, then drop in a portrait only when you want more personalized analysis.

Your Live Salon Agent

Talk to the stylist from the first second, keep the webcam on if you want a live framing loop, then add a portrait for stronger personalization without leaving the main stage.

Anchor Quality
recoveringNo face box yet. Keep your face centered and well lit.
Precision fit controls

Fine-tune the overlay live for this face and camera angle. This sits on top of the automatic calibration so the demo operator can recover alignment in seconds, even when the browser face lock lands slightly left, right, high, low, or short through the fringe and ends.

x0.97 • y -2.0 • h 75% • w 79%
Face lock quality
Turn on the webcam or upload a portrait to anchor the overlay.
recovering lock • 0%

No face box yet. Keep your face centered and well lit.

Without a detectable face box, the studio falls back to editorial heuristics tuned to face shape and hairstyle silhouette.

Talk To The Agent

Shape the brief out loud like you're in the chair.

Ask for softness, polish, edge, lower maintenance, or a little more drama. The agent will rebalance the live overlay, remember your last few turns, and speak the strongest stylist-ready mashup back to you.

Spoken preference capture
Mic unavailableVoice unavailable

Typed notes stay in place while final dictated phrases are added to the brief.

Start talking to append spoken direction, then edit the combined brief before sending it to the agent.

Session memory 1 turns
Stylist Response

Turn on the webcam or use your uploaded selfie, then tell the agent what vibe you want. I’ll turn that into a live preview-friendly mashup.

The agent now keeps the recent conversation in play, so follow-up requests like softer, shorter, or more editorial build on the previous direction instead of resetting the session.
Nano Banana Finish
Generate the stylist-ready board

This sends the current haircut direction, face notes, and your portrait reference into Gemini image generation to create the final beauty board for handoff.

Session Memory
Last 1 turns
Stylist

Turn on the webcam or use your uploaded selfie, then tell the agent what vibe you want. I’ll turn that into a live preview-friendly mashup.

Step 01 Portrait Scan

Start with a portrait that feels like a cover shot.

Upload one clear, front-facing photo and we'll use it as the live base for every hairstyle mashup, salon recommendation, and agent conversation.

Selected portrait
No image selected yet
Best with a straight-on angle, soft lighting, and visible hairline.

We only use this image inside the session to power the preview and recommendation flow.

Your portrait stage will appear here.

Textured Bob

Selected

A sharp but wearable starter look with clean lines and easy polish.

Curtain Layers

A face-framing option that keeps movement, softness, and length in play.

Modern Shag

A more directional cut with texture and crown lift for instant camera energy.

Curated Demo Matches

Match your cut with a salon

Pick one of your AI looks, enter the area you want to search, and we'll surface salons that fit the vibe and technical finish of that cut.

Selected look: Textured Bob

Demo feature for the hackathon build: results are curated sample matches generated from your selected look, not a live maps integration yet.
